Accept the device, then assign it to an: Kubali kifaa, kisha kitenga kwa tukio kuanza usajili.
Back up modified files before upgrading: Hifadhi nakala ya faili zilizobadilishwa kabla ya kusasisha ikiwa unataka kuweka mabadiliko yako.
Click the registration toggle above to o: Bofya kitufe cha usajili hapo juu kufungua dirisha la usajili la sekunde 30.
Create a database backup before applying: Tengeneza nakala ya hifadhidata kabla ya kutumia sasisho. Hii inapendekezwa sana.

No issues found. You may proceed with th: Hakuna matatizo yaliyopatikana. Unaweza kuendelea na usasishaji.

The device will register itself and appe: Kifaa kitajisajili na kuonekana kwenye jedwali hapa chini kama "Inasubiri".
